objectives.text: Talk to The Hooded One
Kill Rootdredge
Basket at the Orok Campsite
Hanging tree corpse
Enter the Ziggurat Encampment
Talk to Alva, Oswald, and The Hooded One
Talk to Farrow, accept his Act 3 rune quest
notes: 0.5 — unlocks Unique Verisium Runeforging (upgrade base type of sub-55 Unique drops)

objectives.text: Lvl 30 flask upgrade at Rog (increased recovery + charges)
Enter Jungle Ruins (top exit)
Kill Mighty Silverfist
notes: Dodge the slam SIDEWAYS (not backwards) — the wave travels in the attack direction

objectives.text: Jungle Grave (ravaged corpse) → Servi
notes: 0.5: talk to the explorers at the camps — they reveal the next area on your minimap

objectives.text: Field vendor
Find the waypoint near Venom Crypts, then enter Infested Barrens
Find and talk to Alva, take the waypoint near her
Field vendor
Scout exits to Chimeral Wetlands and Azak Bog
notes: Enter each, take the waypoint, then return

objectives.text: TP to Venom Crypts (via the Jungle Ruins waypoint)
Sarcophagus event
Find the corpse, loot the Corpse-snake Venom, then TP to town
Talk to Servi — PERMANENT CHOICE
notes: Cannot be changed later: +25% Stun Threshold (popular), +30% Elemental Ailment Threshold, or +25% Mana Regen

objectives.text: TP to Chimeral Wetlands
Field vendor
Toxic Bloom point of interest
Enter Temple of Chaos → take waypoint → return
notes: Run the Trial of Chaos for your 2nd Ascendancy whenever ready

objectives.text: Kill Xyclucian, the Chimera, loot the Inscribed Ultimatum
Enter Jiquani's Machinarium (behind the boss)
Use the Inscribed Ultimatum at the trial entrance
Pick favorable mods (avoid lightning runes if low Lightning Res)
notes: Soul Core skip: dodge roll between the slam and twist of the placement animation — duplicates the core into all sockets

objectives.text: Complete the trial
Summon/talk to Alva, loot a Small Soul Core, use it on the Stone Altar
notes: Layout is a squared U-shape, generators at opposite tips

objectives.text: Loot 3 Small Soul Cores to open doors
Open the door, kill Blackjaw, use the Flame Core
Open another door, enter Jiquani's Sanctum
Summon/talk to Alva
Loot 2 Medium Soul Cores, place them in the Generators
Back to start → click the Large Soul Core → kill Zicoatly → loot the core
TP to Infested Barrens
Use the core on the Stone Altar next to the waypoint
Enter The Matlan Waterways
Walk over the pressure pads (auto-activate on contact), proceed to the end
notes: 0.5: levers became walk-over pads and the final canal is pre-drained — just walk straight through

objectives.text: Hut → kill the rare
TP back to town
Downstairs → talk to Alva
Enter The Drowned City (bottom exit)
Scout exits to Apex of Filth and The Molten Vault
notes: Enter each, take the waypoint, then return

objectives.text: TP to Azak Bog
Summon/talk to Servi
Flameskin rituals
notes: Boss arena is always top-right; reset-farm magic packs around the fire shrine for XP

objectives.text: Kill Ignagduk, the Bog Witch, use the Gemrot Skull
Talk to Servi in town for the Frozen Charm, then TP to The Molten Vault (1st char) or town
Kill Mektul, the Forgemaster (1st char only)
notes: Return the Hammer of Kamasa to Oswald in town to unlock the bench; skip on alts

objectives.text: TP back to town, talk to Oswald, then TP to Apex of Filth
Find 3 Mushrooms → use the Cauldron
Kill the Queen of Filth, loot the Temple Door Idol
notes: Stay close to her — moving away triggers her rolling slam ultimate

objectives.text: TP back to town
Downstairs in town → talk to Alva → door behind her → enter Temple of Kopec
Kill Ketzuli, High Priest of the Sun (upstairs)
notes: Each floor is a triangle — the far corner has a 50% chance of being correct; check it first

objectives.text: Talk to Alva, wait for the lore
In town take the Gateway, then downstairs → enter Utzaal
Farm the Sacrificial Heart from Vaal Goliaths (canister on shoulder)
notes: Can also drop in Aggorat — only this monster type drops it

objectives.text: Energise the 6 Ancient Beacons across Utzaal & Aggorat, open the portal to the Vaal Ruins
notes: 0.5: Fate of the Vaal is now core campaign content — this is your first encounter; it continues in the Interludes

objectives.text: Kill Viper Napuatzi
notes: Highly mobile and evasive — bait her first attack cycle to predict her

objectives.text: Enter Aggorat
Find the Sacrificial Altar (top right of map)
notes: Town crier chanting points you the right way; edge of the pyramid = boss

objectives.text: Place the Sacrificial Heart, stab it with the Dagger
League mechanic (Crag Tooth)
Enter The Black Chambers (top left of map)
Kill Doryani, the Blood Alchemist (Act Boss)
notes: Phase 2 (Doryani's Triumph): rage gives a fortifying buff before engaging

objectives.text: Wait for loot (~30s), then TP back to town
Talk to Doryani, then again after the cataclysm
Talk to Alva → The Hooded One → Alva to travel to Act 4 (Karui Archipelago)
